label: Strategy Classification
definition: Characterizes strategic positioning or market stance of a vendor or technology

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Forward-looking forecast about survivability or adoption

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified real-world result corresponding to a prior prediction

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity readiness or capability

label: Framework Factor
definition: Element of an analytical or conceptual framework presented in the study

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative data about market size share or dynamics

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Analyst judgment or recommendation not tied to a specific metric

label: Etl
definition: Extract Transform Load data integration paradigm
